subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou seest me with clipped wings and broken pinions, my heart consumed with fire, my limbs trembling by reason of what hath befallen me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب ترانی مقصوص الاباهر مکسور الجناح متسعر الاحشاء مرتعد الاعضاء بما ورد
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
